_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes with detailed history, signs & symptoms, and indication for procedure?
Chest X Ray AP/ Lateral available?
USG / CT scan stills/ report available?
Patient presented with antenatal USG showing diaphragmatic hernia, respiratory distress, or recurrent chest infection?
X ray chest/ abdomen, USG chest/ CT chest tests done?

cpd_claim.q: Detailed ICPs with daily vitals and line of treatment available?
Discharge summary with follow-up advise at discharge available?

common_queries: Antenatal USG not showing diaphragmatic hernia, respiratory distress, or recurrent chest infection, or not documented.
X ray chest/abdomen, USG chest/CT chest tests not performed or not reported.
Clinical notes lacking detailed history, signs & symptoms, or indication for procedure.
Fetal Cardiogram missing at the time of claim submission.
Detailed ICPs with daily vitals and line of treatment not available at claim submission.
Pre-anesthesia check-up report not available at claim submission.

clinical_key_pointers: Chest movements that don't coordinate with the baby's breathing rhythm
Breath sounds absent on the affected side
Bowel sounds heard in the chest
Concave abdomen that feels less full when touched
